trait.name: Aftershock
trait.effect: Once a round, after you damage a foe with an ability, you can cause vibrations in that foe. At the end of their next turn, if they are adjacent to any object, you may cause them to take 2 piercing damage. Increase this by +1d6 if they are adjacent to two or more objects. Then this effect ends.

basicAttack.name: Magi
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6
Area effect: 2 damage
Effect a difficult (5+) dangerous terrain space in the center space, even if it's occupied.

limitBreak.name: Cataclysm
limitBreak.effect:
I, protected by the holy trigram,
Summon the ten thousand molten kings.
Run amok with thy furies, and rend the immortal stone,
Turn Heaven and Earth!
Effect a character in range. At the end of that character's turn:
• create height 1 objects in every free adjacent space to them
• every character in an adjacent space to them gains slow and takes 3 piercing damage.
Then push all adjacent characters 1d3 away from the targeted character.

keywords.name: Dominant
keywords.description: Gains extra effects depending on the elevation difference between you and your target.
